refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, IsRetired FROM silver.DeleteWhereTarget WHERE IsRetired = 0;
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, IsRetired FROM silver.DeleteWhereTarget ), filter AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, IsRetired FROM import WHERE IsRetired = 0 ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, IsRetired FROM filter ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries read from silver.DeleteWhereTarget as the sole source table.

output_columns.summary: Both queries output identical columns: ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, IsRetired.

joins.summary: Neither query contains join patterns. No joins to evaluate.

filters.summary: Both queries apply the same filter condition: WHERE IsRetired = 0.
